name: Live
description: Mayonaka Punch's leader, who recently woke up from a 20 year supernatural slumber. She feels like she has a fated connection to [Masaki](https://anilist.co/character/329072/Masaki-Sonoue) and agrees to collaborate on a channel in order to drink her blood.

name: Lucy Yamagami
description: Yamagami's first name is so long it is often abbreviated to just "Lucy". Her parents had difficulty choosing a name and listed all the ideas on the registration form. This becomes an ongoing embarrassment for her and she proclaims that she became a civil servant only to exact revenge on the sloppy bureaucrat that approved her name! She becomes angry when people refer to her by first name (or any abbreviation). Her full first name (or at least as much as she bothered listing) is: Lucy Kimiko Akie

name: Maruzensky
description: __Height:__ 164 cm A dashing Umamusume with a sisterly demeanor and a retro way of speaking. She is a speed demon who adores the pure joy of the wind in her face. On the road, her hot rod is the one burning rubber, but in a race, it's her own two feet tearing up the track. Despite her tremendous power, she isn't pompous, and is well-liked by everyone. In [Uma Musume: Pretty Derby](https://anilist.co/anime/98514) she is member of Team Rigil.

name: Mihono Bourbon
description: __Height:__ 160 cm A horse girl who views the world through the lens of programming and databases, carrying out her objectives in an expressionless and robotic manner. Even so, she is not an emotionless machine—her constant training since her youth has simply resulted in less interactions with people, leading to her current personality. Underneath that robotic shell, she does indeed have feelings.
mediaTitles: Umamusume: Pretty Derby - Road to the Top
searchTerms: Umamusume: Pretty Derby - Road to the Top

name: Mikazuki Munechika
description: Crafted by Sanjo Munechika, a swordsmith from the Heian period. He is one of the Five Great Swords of Japan, and is said to be the most beautiful of them all. His appearance as a swordsman is as elegant as a Heian aristocrat. It sounds good to say that he has great capacity, and he is the ultimate laid-back person.

name: Patamon
description: Patamon is a small orange cute flying guinea pig like creature with light blue eyes and bat-like wings, which could possibly be his ears. This mammal digimon has also been considered to look like a mouse or pig with wings. Patamon is a main character in Digimon Adventure and Digimon Adventure 02, as well as the movies Digimon Adventure (The movie), Our War Game!, The Golden Digimentals and Diaboromon Strikes Back. Patamon is the playful Digimon partner of T.K.. In Digimon Adventure, Patamon was

name: Rei Togetsu
description: **Position:** Vocals/Keyboard Rei is a member of **[Happy Around!](https://anilist.co/staff/263432)** Born into a wealthy family, Rei had lessons in all sorts of activities in which she showed the most talent at piano. She felt oppressed living the life her parents had prepared for her, but didn't have the courage to make a change. name: Rio Amakusa
description: Rio is a high school student who is Ichika's best friend and is in the same class as her. She is a member of the tennis club and is also Ryou's younger sister.
mediaTitles: Koi to Yobu ni wa Kimochi Warui
searchTerms: Koi to Yobu ni wa Kimochi Warui

name: Salama
description: The fairy of fire of the fairies of Elementario, who usually has a lazy and unmotivated personality when it comes to performing at the park. She seems to enjoy being on her phone when she is not performing and apparently engages in flaming wars.
mediaTitles: Amagi Brilliant Park: No Time to Take It Easy!
Amagi Brilliant Park: Wakuwaku Mini Theater Rakugaki Backstage

name: Saori Makishima
description: __Height:__ 180 cm One of Kirino's otaku friends. She is a tall, bespectacled girl dressed in otaku fashion. Her alias Bajeena is a clear reference to Quattro Bajeena from Zeta Gundam. She is the moderator for the 'Otaku Girls Unite' Community. ~!Later it is revealed that she is from a very rich and high-class family. !~ ~!She is actually very pretty when she is dressed in normal attire, as you find out in episode 3 of season 2. name: Sherry
description: The Second Slave purchased by Michio Kaga in hopes of acquiring another person to enter the labyrinths with. She is petite in stature

name: Shiki Misaki
description: A stylish girl focused on always staying fashion-forward. She carries her handmade cat plushie with her wherever she goes.

Kingdom Hearts 3D: Dream Drop Distance The Novel

name: Shion Sumeragi
description: Nicknamed "Shii", Shion is a recognized genius who comes from a family of geniuses. She has purple hair and eyes and has a low body temperature. She has many brothers, one who is a chef, one who is a pianist, and another who is a barista. Although she is a genius she lacks common sense. As Shii is the sole daughter in her family, she likes to dote on younger girls acting as an older sister to them, especially Tama.

name: Shun Aonuma
description: Another one of Saki's childhood friends. Shun is very clever, with a strong intellectual curiosity and mature manners. His marks in magic are excellent at Saint Academy, and many have high hopes for his future. According to Satoru, Shun is the most talented at using the Force in their group.

name: Skadi Dragenfelt
nativeName: スカディ・ドラーゲンフェルト

name: Sohara Mitsuki
description: **Height:** 158 cm Sohara is Tomoki's childhood friend who lives across the road from him and often goes to his house in the morning to wake him up. As a child, she was constantly ill and thus had few friends. She is continually jealous of Tomoki's relationships with the various Angeloids and generally acts on this jealousy by karate-chopping Tomoki; however, she also does it whenever he's being perverted in her presence. She is also in love with Tomoki and her breasts always seem to be getting

name: Sylvia van Hossen
nativeName: シルヴィア＝ファン・ホッセン
description: Arima Teppei's fiancée and sparring partner. She is very skilled in sword fighting and enjoys her spars with Teppei. She is a bit reserved and is trying to understand Teppei being a friend first. She is the elder of the two daughters of the Head of Van Hossen Family, Vincent van Hossen. Maria, her younger sister wants her to marry Teppei. Her best friend in school is Charlotte, the Princess of Hazelrink. Mother: ~!According to the eroge, her mother is Japanese and Vincent van Hossen's first wife

name: Tamate Momochi
description: A bubbly, cheerful girl from Hana's class who likes to be friends with everyone she meets. She likes to be called "Tama" because she does not like her full name's association with the word _tamatebako._

name: Thomas Andre
description: Thomas Andre (트마스 아드레) is one of only 5 National Level Hunters that exist and is considered to be the strongest Tank on Earth. He is also the Guild Master of the Scavenger Guild.
mediaTitles: Solo Leveling Season 2 -Arise from the Shadow-
searchTerms: Solo Leveling Season 2 -Arise from the Shadow-

name: Xellos
description: Xellos tends to behave like a playful trickster, answering nearly all questions directed toward him with "Sore wa himitsu desu," literally "That is a secret." He seems to delight in the frustration that ensues with his withholding of information. For the majority of the second season, Xellos acts simply for comedy's sake frequently breaking the fourth wall and addressing the viewers; all the while subtly and even sinisterly advancing the plot. Generally, Xellos' mood can be determined by the sta

name: Asako Yaeshima
description: __Height:__ 156 cm (5'4") Asako is an office lady who has a complex about her excessive sweating. She works in the accounting department at Lilia Drop, a company that manufactures makeup and bath products that are tremendously popular with women. As a child, she was called "Aseko." (Ase means sweat.) Asako likes looking at cute outfits in fashion magazines and has a weakness for cute furnishings and knick-knacks.

name: Ayaka Sajyou
description: Ayaka Sajyou is a magus living in Fuyuki City attending school at Homurahara Academy. She is also a former student of the El-Melloi Classroom, having attended classes for about a month. __In Fate/Prototype:__ ~!She’s the Master of [Saber](https://anilist.co/character/497) in the Second Tokyo Holy Grail War.!~ __In Fate/strange Fake:__ ~!She's the "True" Master of [Saber](https://anilist.co/character/127453) in the True and False Holy Grail Wars. name: Ayano Kannagi
description: Sixteen year old Ayano is a skilled En-Jutsushi and the successor to the Kannagi family's head. She is arrogant and irrational, usually taking action by herself even while going against orders. Though she seems undisciplined, she is very proud of her heritage.
